name: ubag
description: UBAG docs-first baseline for the Universal Browser-Automation Gateway platform.

scripts.test:dashboard: pnpm dashboard:check && pnpm dashboard:build && pnpm --filter @ubag/dashboard test && pnpm --filter @ubag/dashboard test:e2e
scripts.test:cli: pnpm --filter @ubag/cli typecheck && pnpm --filter @ubag/cli test && pnpm --filter @ubag/cli cli -- --help && pnpm --filter @ubag/cli cli -- help cancel-job && pnpm --filter @ubag/cli cli -- help retry-job && pnpm --filter @ubag/cli cli -- mock-run --prompt smoke
scripts.test:schema: pnpm check:contracts && pnpm lint:openapi && pnpm lint:schemas && pnpm lint:proto
scripts.test:sdk: pnpm check:sdk-freshness && pnpm test:sdk:typescript && pnpm test:sdk:go
scripts.test:v0:local: pnpm test:schema && pnpm test:edge-store && pnpm test:plugins && pnpm test:adapter-registry && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:worker && pnpm test:sidecar && pnpm test:sdk && pnpm test:conformance && pnpm test:observability && pnpm test:cli && pnpm test:dashboard && pnpm test:deployment && pnpm test:docs
scripts.check: pnpm check:blueprint && pnpm check:contracts && pnpm check:sdk-freshness && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:observability && pnpm test:dashboard && pnpm test:docs
